mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, key, name, description, permissions, data_scope_type, status, is_system, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace_role (id, workspace_id, key, name, description, permissions, data_scope_type, status, is_system, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{key}, #{name}, #{description}, #{permissionsJson}, #{dataScopeType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{isSystem}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace_role SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, permissions = #{permissionsJson}, data_scope_type = #{dataScopeType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
